'''zhangufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jhit|jhit]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ng-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jhit|jhit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhangufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhængifith|zhængifith]] || [[word:zhængifij|zhængifij]] || [[word:zhængifish|zhængifish]] || [[word:zhængifi|zhængifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhangungufuth|zhangungufuth]] || [[word:zhangungufuj|zhangungufuj]] || [[word:zhangungufush|zhangungufush]] || [[word:zhangungufu|zhangungufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhangufuth|zhangufuth]] || [[word:zhangufuj|zhangufuj]] || [[word:zhangufush|zhangufush]] || [[word:zhangufu|zhangufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhanguffuth|zhanguffuth]] || [[word:zhanguffuj|zhanguffuj]] || [[word:zhanguffush|zhanguffush]] || [[word:zhanguffuf|zhanguffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhangufuthu|zhangufuthu]] || [[word:zhangufuju|zhangufuju]] || [[word:zhangufushu|zhangufushu]] || [[word:zhangufuku|zhangufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhangufuth|zhangufuth]] || [[word:zhangufuj|zhangufuj]] || [[word:zhangufush|zhangufush]] || [[word:zhangufu|zhangufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhangufuthul|zhangufuthul]] || [[word:zhangufujul|zhangufujul]] || [[word:zhangufushul|zhangufushul]] || [[word:zhangufukul|zhangufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhangufuthuthu|zhangufuthuthu]] || [[word:zhangufujuju|zhangufujuju]] || [[word:zhangufushushu|zhangufushushu]] || [[word:zhangufuku|zhangufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhangufuthun|zhangufuthun]] || [[word:zhangufujun|zhangufujun]] || [[word:zhangufushun|zhangufushun]] || [[word:zhangufukun|zhangufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhangufuthuoro|zhangufuthuoro]] || [[word:zhangufujuoro|zhangufujuoro]] || [[word:zhangufushuoro|zhangufushuoro]] || [[word:zhangufukuoro|zhangufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
